content: GitHub Actions official docs support protected environments whose secrets are unavailable before protection rules pass, tag/branch restrictions, least-privilege permissions, concurrency groups, OIDC for supported external providers, and artifact attestations via actions/attest@v4 with id-token:write, contents:read, attestations:write. Third-party actions should be pinned to full commit SHAs. GitHub OIDC does not by itself authenticate to Mooncakes without registry support; use it for GitHub attestations only.
